---
title: "Environmental Statistics: Midterm"
author:
  - name: Bella Kormos
    affiliation: UCSB Environmental Studies BS\n Spanish minor 
categories: [Quarto, R-studio]
image: stats_icon.png
draft: false
---

[ENVS 193DS Midterm](midterm_resub.pdf)

<iframe src="midterm_resub.pdf" width="85%" height="500px">

</iframe>
